title: [TA simulated] A practical checklist: A ET Markets guide for ET investors
body:
Surukkam for enterprise content managers and brand/legal teams: Launch a compliant content workflow for a product update with required disclaimers

Variant note: add a short checklist and a clear next action.

- Padikkattu 1: Convert internal inputs into structured drafts.
- Padikkattu 2: Run compliance guardrails before anything ships.
- Padikkattu 3: Localize with consistent terminology.
- Padikkattu 4: Package per channel and track outcomes.

Avashiya vilakkam: This content is for informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Please consult a qualified professional. Past performance is not indicative of future results.
